Direct mapping - Description field; Data type changed from char(45) to varchar(255); Increased length capacity
Direct mapping - Primary customer name; Data type changed from char(45) to nvarchar(128); Unicode support added
No direct target mapping - Secondary name field not present in target schema; Data may need concatenation with CustomerName or stored in extended attributes

No direct target mapping - State stored in BusinessParty entity; Requires denormalization to BusinessParty table
No direct target mapping - ZIP code stored in BusinessParty entity; Requires denormalization to BusinessParty table
Direct mapping - Last modification timestamp; Data type upgraded from datetime to datetime2(7) for higher precision
Semantic mapping - User identifier changed from char(12) to uniqueidentifier (GUID); Requires user lookup/transformation
No direct target mapping - SSN not present in Customer table; May be stored in Entity table or separate secure storage for PII compliance
Direct mapping - Federal tax identifier; Data type changed from char(9) to varchar(50); Field renamed from FEDERAL_ID to TIN (Tax Identification Number)
No direct target mapping - State identifier not in target schema; May require custom field or extended attributes
No direct target mapping - Care of address field not in target; May be stored in BusinessParty entity
No direct target mapping - Account address stored in BusinessParty entity; Requires denormalization

No direct target mapping - Quaternary account address not in target; Requires denormalization to BusinessParty table
No direct target mapping - Client care of field not in target; May be stored in BusinessParty entity
New target column - Primary key using GUID; No source equivalent; Auto-generated during migration
New target column - Foreign key to CustomerType lookup table; No source equivalent; Requires business rule mapping or default value
New target column - Active status flag; No source equivalent; Default to 1 (true) or derive from business logic
New target column - Record creator identifier; No source equivalent; Set to migration user or system account
New target column - Record creation timestamp; No source equivalent; Set to migration timestamp or earliest known date
New target column - TCC (Tax Compliance Certificate) number; No source equivalent; May remain NULL or require external data source
New target column - Address preference flag; No source equivalent; Default to 0 (false) or derive from business logic
New target column - Foreign key to BusinessParty entity for address/contact normalization; No source equivalent; Requires creation of BusinessParty records
New target column - Deactivation timestamp; No source equivalent; NULL for active records
New target column - User who deactivated record; No source equivalent; NULL for active records
New target column - Zenith system flag; No source equivalent; Set to 1 (true) for all migrated records from Zenith source system
